visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a medium shot of a young woman with long, wavy brown hair. Her face is covered with small, uniform white cream dots on her forehead and cheeks. She wears a floral-patterned top and stands against a neutral, softly lit indoor background. She speaks enthusiastically, using expressive hand gestures and pointing to her face. (2) The camera cuts to a tight close-up of the woman's lips, showing dryness and some peeling skin. Her index finger touches her lip to highlight the texture. The scene then transitions through a series of screen-captured social media comments and snippets of her previous videos, focusing on lip aesthetics. (3) The woman is then seen in her room, looking surprised while holding a black smartphone. She transitions to presenting a round, bright pink cosmetic container from the brand CELLMULA. She opens it to reveal a mirror and a pink lip balm, using a small applicator to show the product's texture. (4) A second product, a long pink tube from the same brand, is introduced. The woman demonstrates the twisting mechanism and the clear gel emerging from the tip. She applies both products to her lips in separate segments, showing a noticeable glossy and hydrated effect. The lighting remains bright and consistent throughout. (5) The final segment shows the woman holding both products side-by-side. She smiles at the camera, providing final promotional details. A text graphic with a discount code appears near the bottom. The video ends with her waving cheerfully in the same indoor setting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 在韓國紅到不行的. [Subtitle]: 臉部「微針精華」. (2) [Subtitle]: 有一天突然覺得. (3) [Subtitle]: “為什麼嘴唇用的沒有？”. (4) [Subtitle]: 我平常嘴唇. (5) [Subtitle]: 又容易脫皮. (6) [Subtitle]: 有時候氣色不好. (7) [Subtitle]: 唇色暗沈. (8) [Subtitle]: 唇紋也很深. (9) [Subtitle]: 每天發影片的時候. (10) [Subtitle]: 觀眾都會問我. (11) [Subtitle]: “你的嘴唇怎麼了？”. (12) [Subtitle]: “受傷了嗎？”. (13) [Subtitle]: 但這麼痛的微針精華. (14) [Subtitle]: 總不能直接塗在嘴唇上吧！. (15) [Subtitle]: 結果發現原來.. (16) [Subtitle]: 唇部專用的. [Subtitle]: 微針護唇膏！. [Subtitle]: 而且台灣竟然也能買的到！？. (17) [Slogan]: 買起來🔥. (18) [Subtitle]: 這可不是那種. (19) [Subtitle]: 超辣的豐唇蜜❌. (20) [Subtitle]: 而是真的屬於保養型的. [Subtitle]: 微針護唇膏. (21) [Subtitle]: 韓國CELLMULA推出的. [Subtitle]: 泌潤微晶雙效護唇膏. (22) [Subtitle]: 長相很像馬卡龍對吧. (23) [Subtitle]: 而且旁邊就有膏壓棒. (24) [Subtitle]: 非常可愛呢😍. (25) [Subtitle]: 其實我第一次擦的時候有一點嚇到？. (26) [Subtitle]: 真的是微針護唇. (27) [Subtitle]: 有一點點刺刺. (28) [Subtitle]: 但不會不舒服啦💛. (29) [Subtitle]: 裡面的天然海藻微針. (30) [Subtitle]: 非常溫和～. (31) [Subtitle]: 會慢慢把角質帶走. (32) [Subtitle]: 唇色暗沈、粗糙. (33) [Slogan]: 直接拜拜👋. (34) [Subtitle]: 再配上積雪草萃取外泌體. (35) [Subtitle]: 邊保濕邊修護. (36) [Subtitle]: 還偷偷幫你把唇型「開濾鏡」. (37) [Subtitle]: 拍照完全不用修圖. (38) [Subtitle]: 我晚上厚厚敷一整天. (39) [Subtitle]: 隔天照鏡子那刻. (40) [Subtitle]: 真的有種. (41) [Subtitle]: 這還是我的嘴唇嗎？. (42) [Subtitle]: 而且白天薄薄擦. [Subtitle]: 嘴唇有那種水潤感💕. (43) [Subtitle]: 另一個是. [Subtitle]: 泌潤果凍雙效唇萃. (44) [Subtitle]: 這款也非常特別. (45) [Subtitle]: 只要輕輕旋轉出口. (46) [Subtitle]: 就會擠出唇萃✅. (47) [Subtitle]: 用潤唇產品最煩的就是. (48) [Subtitle]: 手上黏黏的. (49) [Subtitle]: 但這款不用擔心！. (50) [Subtitle]: 塗上去立刻有. [Subtitle]: 果凍光澤. (51) [Subtitle]: 唇紋瞬間被柔焦掉. (52) [Subtitle]: 剛剛唇膏是晚上集中管理用🌙. (53) [Subtitle]: 這個是白天隨時都可以擦的. (54) [Subtitle]: 完全不影響原唇妝. (55) [Subtitle]: 質地本身非常輕盈. (56) [Subtitle]: 但又能深層滋潤. (57) [Subtitle]: 超適合台灣的天氣！. (58) [Subtitle]: 像我嘴唇本身很乾燥需要保養. (59) [Subtitle]: 但白天擦了唇釉. (60) [Subtitle]: 又不想再疊厚重潤唇膏的人. (61) [Subtitle]: 一定會愛上這支💕. (62) [Subtitle]: 除了有積雪草萃取外泌體跟膠原蛋白. (63) [Subtitle]: 可以修護滋潤以外. (64) [Subtitle]: 還有豐唇科技. [Subtitle]: Volufiline®專利豐潤因子. (65) [Subtitle]: 會讓唇型看起來更飽滿💗. (66) [Subtitle]: 不用跑醫美診所. (67) [Subtitle]: 也能打造韓系水光唇. (68) [Subtitle]: 素顏的時候單擦. (69) [Subtitle]: 天生水潤唇的效果. (70) [Subtitle]: 我真的超喜歡這款. (71) [Subtitle]: 跟傳統潤唇產品比真的不一樣. (72) [Subtitle]: 嘴唇乾扁真的會回購. (73) [Subtitle]: 尤其是它的成分真的很讚✅. (74) [Subtitle]: 醫美術後也能安心使用. (75) [Subtitle]: 大家，現在輸入我的優惠碼. [Slogan]: 602avenue. (76) [Slogan]: 購買享單項產品$999元. (77) [Subtitle]: 像我這種嘴唇很容易乾裂的人. (78) [Subtitle]: 還有整天在冷氣房工作的人. (79) [Subtitle]: 用這支早晚保養. (80) [Subtitle]: 真的可以養出平滑又豐潤的雙唇👄.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator speaking to the camera throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long brown wavy hair, wearing a white and blue floral print blouse. She has a bright and clear complexion with natural makeup.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern indoor living space with a neutral-colored sofa and soft, warm lighting that creates a professional studio-like atmosphere.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched and energetic female voice speaking rapidly. The background music is an upbeat electronic pop track with a steady, driving drum beat and shimmering synth chords. The acoustic environment is clean and professional, with no significant ambient noise. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect triggers as the speaker highlights her lip problems, accompanied by a subtle transition in her vocal pitch to express concern. The music continues without interruption, maintaining a consistent energy level. (3) As the speaker introduces the round CELLMULA product, a 'pop' SFX occurs. Her tone becomes more explanatory and persuasive. The rhythmic intensity of the BGM supports the fast pace of the information delivery. (4) During the product application sequences, small 'bling' or magical sound effects are used to emphasize the visual transformation of the lips. The speaker's voice remains dominant and well-articulated, layered clearly over the music. (5) The final phase features a shift to a promotional tone. The speaker's arousal level remains high as she announces the discount code. The BGM maintains its tempo until the end, concluding with the speaker's final energetic farewell.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Problem Identification -> Solution Introduction -> Product Demonstration 1 -> Product Demonstration 2 -> Benefit Comparison -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and review two specific lip care products from the brand CELLMULA by demonstrating their application and highlighting their effectiveness for dry or dull lips, ultimately encouraging viewers to purchase using a provided discount code.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator provides a specific discount code and details pricing for the products featured prominently throughout the video.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-density editing style characteristic of social media short-form content, with constant text overlays and upbeat music to maintain high viewer engagement. The transition from face care to lip care provides a relatable narrative hook.
